'''Smithy''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. Smithy was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The Rebel was honored at a funeral service along with fellow pilots [[Blue Eight (Defiance)|Blue Eight]], [[Roanda]], [[Voxx]] and [[Waudok]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
